event: Kemi Badenoch is elected leader of the Conservative Party
Local elections in England; Runcorn and Helsby by-election (Reform gain from Labour)
Gillian Mackay and Ross Greer are elected as co-leaders of the Scottish Greens
Zack Polanski is elected as leader of the Green Party of England and Wales
Gorton and Denton by-election (Green gain from Labour)
